ddls:
CREATE TABLE "signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal */,
  "signal_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal */,
  "ball_no" TEXT /* Ball number associated with the signal */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the signal (e.g., OZ) */,
  "ipd_ipu" TEXT /* Indicates if the signal is IPD or IPU */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal's purpose or function */,
  "signal_group" TEXT /* Group to which the signal belongs */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the signal */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the signal was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the signal */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the hardware component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., Memory, Processor) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Technical specifications of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the component */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the component */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the component */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was installed */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Warranty expiration date of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the signal being configured */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component associated with the configuration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the configuration */,
  "config_version" INTEGER /* Version of the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the configuration */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the configuration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, project manager, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "detail" TEXT /* Details about the action taken */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the signal associated with the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_versions_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_signals" (
  "project_signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-signal association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project using the signal */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the signal being used in the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the signal within the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_signals_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_signals_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., OZ, DDR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the signal type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
